---
title: "11 reasons why we've stayed in academia"
author: 
- Nature Editorial
publication: "Nature (2024)"
categories: 
  - mentorship
  - careers
href: https://www.nature.com/articles/d41586-024-00724-2
url_preprint: 
journ: "Nature"
issue: 
page: 
year: 2024
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 10.1038/d41586-024-00724-2
---
